results.title: 🚨End of an era at San Siro: Rafael Leão announces Milan exit
results.description: Portuguese forward Rafael Leão has shaken up the European transfer market by officially confirming his decision to leave AC Milan ahead of next season. The Serie A megastar will bring a successful spell with the Rossoneri to an end as he looks to embark on a new path in his professional career. In search of new challenges In an exclusive interview with Sport TV Portugal, the talented 26-year-old winger broke his silence and explained the reasons behind pushing for this change of scenery. The Portuguese attacker made it clear that he is leaving with the satisfaction of a job well done after leaving an unforgettable mark on the Italian club. “I’m proud because I made history at AC Milan, but I want a new chapter. I feel ready to play in another league,” the player admitted. A farewell with no unfinished business Leão, who established himself as one of the most dangerous attackers in the world at San Siro, stated that his time in Italy is completely over. “I gave my best for Milan, but it’s time to try another challenge,” he concluded, immediately sparking interest from the biggest clubs in the Premier League and LaLiga. This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇪🇸 here.

results.title: Gen Z and Gen Alpha want to see caring dads and vulnerable men in movies and TV
results.description: Center for Scholars & Storytellers at UCLA study finds Gen Z and Gen Alpha want to see caring, affectionate dads and men showing vulnerability in movies and TV, rejecting outdated masculine stereotypes. Joyful fatherhood was the single most requested portrayal of masculinity by adolescents surveyed by the researchers, with nearly 60% of young people asking to see more fathers openly showing love and enjoying parenting. 46% of respondents are seeking content that shows men asking for help, including with their mental health. "For today’s young audiences, the most compelling hero isn’t the one standing alone, but the one who has...
